personalInfo.name: Shivani Chaudhary
personalInfo.title: Generative AI Engineer
personalInfo.summary: Generative AI Engineer with hands-on experience building RAG systems and LLM-powered applications using LangChain, Groq, and Streamlit. Skilled in semantic retrieval, prompt optimization, and deploying scalable AI solutions with high accuracy and low latency.
personalInfo.shortSummary: Hands-on experience building RAG systems and LLM-powered applications using LangChain, Groq, and Streamlit. Skilled in semantic retrieval, prompt optimization, and deploying scalable AI solutions with high accuracy and low latency.

innovation.label: // AI & INNOVATION
innovation.heading: Building the
innovation.description: Integrating Generative AI workflows, RAG pipelines, and LLM-powered features into production applications deployed on Hugging Face Spaces.

aboutSection.currentCompany: Pillai College of Arts, Science and Commerce
aboutSection.currentRole: building RAG systems and LLM-powered applications as a Generative AI Engineer

highlights: Developed AI-powered applications using LLM APIs for text generation and summarization, applying prompt engineering to improve output relevance.
Implemented RAG fundamentals including document chunking, embeddings, and semantic search in mini AI projects.
Designed AI-driven preprocessing pipelines using real-world datasets and applied NLP techniques for semantic similarity and text analysis.
Developed structured LLM workflows with LangChain and evaluated system performance based on latency and response accuracy.

projects.title: GenAI RAG Application
projects.description: Built a Generative AI web app using Streamlit and Groq LLM for real-time question answering with Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
highlights: Implemented RAG pipeline with LangChain, text chunking, and embeddings to improve answer accuracy and relevance.
Deployed on Hugging Face Spaces with secure API key management.
Built real-time question answering interface using Streamlit and Groq LLM backend.

projects.title: AI Live Assistant
projects.description: Developed an AI chatbot using Python, Streamlit, Groq AI, and SerpAPI with real-time web search capabilities.
highlights: Integrated NLP and external APIs (SerpAPI) to enhance response accuracy with live web data.
Deployed on Hugging Face Spaces with secure API integration.
Achieved ~95% accuracy and under 3 seconds response time.

projects.title: Book Rental Website
projects.description: Developed a full-featured web-based Book Rental System with user authentication and role-based access control.
highlights: Implemented user authentication and role-based access control for admin and user roles.
Built features for book browsing, renting, returning, and rental tracking.
Created an admin dashboard for complete rental management.

projects.title: AI Resume Analyzer
projects.description: Built an AI Resume Analyzer using Groq LLM and Pydantic that scores resume-JD match, flags missing keywords, and rewrites weak bullet points with structured JSON output.
highlights: Implemented multi-step prompt engineering to extract validated structured data from unstructured resumes using Pydantic models.
Built resume-JD matching algorithm that scores alignment, identifies missing keywords, and suggests improvements.
Deployed on Hugging Face Spaces with secure secret management and Git-based version control.

education.university: Pillai College of Arts, Science and Commerce
